title: dendrobium parvulum subsp. minutum
intro: Dendrobium parvulum subsp. minutum, also known as the small Dendrobium, is a type of flowering orchid native to Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Dendrobium parvulum subsp. minutum include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory problems, and supporting immune system function. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is prepared by boiling its roots and stems to create a tea or decoction, which is then used to treat various ailments.
